title: Checkout accepts an impossible birth date

context.issueSummary: Guest checkout accepted a future birth date and created an invalid order.

expectedBehavior: Checkout must reject impossible birth dates and display a validation error before submission.
observedFailure: A future birth date bypassed validation and created a persisted order record.

rootCause.technicalCause: Date validation only checked for presence and format, not whether the value was in a valid range.
rootCause.triggerCondition: Users entered a valid ISO date that represented a future date.
rootCause.whyItEscapedEarlier: The test suite covered empty and malformed values but not semantic date validation.

confirmationTestBeforeFix.notes: A new test asserting future dates are rejected failed against the old implementation.

codeChanges.fixStrategy: Added an upper-bound date guard in shared checkout validation and tightened the error path in the form layer.
codeChanges.riskNotes: Low risk outside checkout because the helper is only used by the checkout flow.

regressionChecks: manual checkout smoke test in staging

documentationUpdates.technicalDocs: No separate technical doc update required.
documentationUpdates.changelog: Added an entry for the checkout validation fix.

verificationAfterFix.additionalValidation: Regression checks passed and the staging form now blocks future dates with a clear validation message.

residualRiskAndFollowUp: Consider extending semantic date validation coverage to profile editing and account onboarding flows.
